response:
## Explanation

This function implements a **lexical scanner (tokenizer/lexer)** that converts a raw mathematical expression string into a structured list of typed tokens using a single left-to-right pass.

It iterates through the input character by character, skipping whitespace, greedily consuming multi-character numeric literals (including decimals) into `('NUM', float)` tuples, and mapping individual arithmetic operators and parentheses into `('OP', char)` tuples — raising an error on any unrecognized character.
